Domen Hribernik

Developer & Tech Enthusiast

About Me

About Me

I'm a Computer Science student at the University of Maribor, Slovenia. I have a deep passion for technology and innovation, specializing in programming, software development, and problem-solving. I am always eager to apply my skills and collaborate on exciting projects. If you're looking for a dedicated and innovative partner to bring your ideas to life, let's work together to achieve your goals.

My Projects

Vita Mavrič Portfolio

This project showcases a custom-built, responsive website for Vita Mavrič, built in vanilla JavaScript. Website

Sudoku

A classic Sudoku game developed in JavaScript, offering a fun and challenging way to test your logic and problem-solving skills. The project showcases my ability to create interactive web applications with a focus on user experience and functionality. GitHub

Wordle Bot

A Python bot for the game Wordle that uses algorithmic strategies to solve puzzles efficiently. This project demonstrates the application of AI techniques to play and solve word games. GitHub

"The only way to do great work is to love what you do."
